case_title: JANICE MENDENHALL et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAN WEINGARTEN. FILED BY MENDENHALL, JANICE CATO, MARK

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - DENISE TAYLOR (LEGAL) - PLEASE REVIEW PROOF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JUL-25-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDENHALL, JANICE CATO, MARK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY DEFENDANT SHALL PAY NOTHING TO PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MENDENHALL, JANICE CATO, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2014 - JUDGMENT.
